contextualize:
Swimming in the lake
Duck
Figure 1: This is a cute duckling

text:
To get started with swimming, first lay down in a water and try not to drown:
- You can relax and look around
- Paddle about
- Enjoy summer warmth
Also, don’t forget:
- Wear sunglasses
- Don’t forget to drink water
- Use sun cream
Hmm, what else…
contextualize:
Swimming in the lake
Let’s swim!
To get started with swimming, first lay down in a water and try not to drown:
- You can relax and look around
- Paddle about
- Enjoy summer warmth
Also, don’t forget:
- Wear sunglasses
- Don’t forget to drink water
- Use sun cream
Hmm, what else…

text:
After we had a good day of swimming in the lake,
it’s important to eat
something nice
I like to eat leaves
Here are some interesting things a respectful duck could eat:
Leaves, Food = Ash, Elm, Maple. Leaves, Calories per portion = 50. Berries, Food = Blueberry, Strawberry, Cranberry. Berries, Calories per portion = 150. Grain, Food = Corn, Buckwheat, Barley. Grain, Calories per portion = 200
And let’s add another list in the end:
- Leaves
- Berries
- Grain
And here my listing in code:
```
Leaves

Berries
Grain
```
